title: RunSkillOutput
description: MCP RPC: run_skill output. See EDITORIAL_ROOM_CONTRACT.md §6.2. Returns immediately with run_id; clawrocket polls via get_run.

is_replay.description: True if this is the same run as a previous identical request (idempotency replay per §6.4).

result_url.description: Present when status=completed; URL to fetch ScoreResult / Suggestion[] / ProposalCard[].
